request.description: SUPER_ADMIN only. Delete one attendee-type Digital Ticket template. Use /events/:eventId for the event-wide template.

SUPER_ADMIN only. Generates a stored PNG Digital Ticket image for one registration using the compact final layout: decorative background behind localized title, prominent visitor name, centered QR in a white rounded box, optional description, and compact date/time cards. The QR encodes the compact signed canonical scan token. Non-force generation may reuse a valid same-version image.

exec: return json && json.data !== undefined ? json.data : json;

request.description: SUPER_ADMIN only. Returns the latest generated Digital Ticket image metadata for a registration.

SUPER_ADMIN only. Regenerates through the Digital Ticket service using the compact final renderer. With forceRegenerate=true, the same registration + template + version output is replaced safely without creating duplicate DigitalTicketImage rows.

SUPER_ADMIN only. Generates a temporary preview PNG using the same compact final Digital Ticket renderer as generated tickets. Background images are decorative only; completed screenshots with baked placeholder boxes cannot support conditional hiding. The preview shows localized title, visitor name, centered QR container, and collapsing optional description/date/time sections. The preview file is written under /uploads/digital-tickets/previews and no DigitalTicketImage row is saved.

exec: return json && json.data !== undefined ? json.data : json;
